entry.title: Re: Create new button with event SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi @RicardoTorresDev ,

I would check the SAP's help portal to get references: SAP Business One | SAP Help Portal

Go to the section "Develop". There you will find extensive SDK and Service Layer documentation. Also, I've seen some YouTube videos tackling basic Service Layer. It might be a good starting point.

I hope it helps.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
@Suzanne_Heiob ,

can you please help - I am not able to find link to take the assessment to stay certified for SuccessFactors EC Core. I have accessed 'My Certifications', clicked on 'Manage certification' and clicked on 'Self-paced course' to complete the learning.

Coming back to 'My certifications', and clicking on 'Take Assessment' then 'Stay Certified' - now I am taken to SAP Learning Hub, where there is nowhere to take the 'stay certified assessment': SAP Learning Hub | Your Online E-Learning Enablement Platform

Can you please advise? My certification expires in couple of weeks. Thank you very much.

But I am getting this error

Have anyone encountered the same? and how did you solve it?

 

Thank you in Advance! 

Alden

entry.title: Re: EWM ITS Mobile - Error page (multilingual support)

entry.title: Re: How the materials are getting displayed in Monitor ma...

entry.title: Re: insufficient privilege currency conversion to shared spaces
entry.content: still a problem

entry.title: Re: Disabling go button in fiori elements v4 filterbar
entry.content:
SAP updated the documentation. We can now use liveMode for fiori elements V4.

"routing": {
	"targets": {
                    "MyEntitiesList": {
                            "type": "Component",
                            "name": "sap.fe.templates.ListReport",
                            "id": "MyEntitiesList",
                            "options": {
                                            "settings": {
                                                            "liveMode": true,
                                                                 …..
                                                                ….
                                                        }
                                        }
                                }
                }
}

entry.title: Re: Is AIX 7.2 TL05 SP09 supported for SAP netweaver 7.5...
entry.content:
To be more specific:

"AIX 7.2 TL 5

      SAP validation tests were successfully performed using AIX 7.2 TL 5 SP1."

means starting form SP1 all upcoming SP's are also valid. So yes. Also SP9 is supported.

Beside this, please have a look also to:  1780629 - AIX: Minimal OS Requirements for SAP Kernel. Make sure you use the supported version of the Runtime !

entry.title: Re: VAR case forwarding via SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API
entry.content:
Hi Mildred,

My contributions above have been limited to the SAP Cloud ALM technical aspects (configuration, workflow, etc.).

I'm afraid that I can't speak to the details of the PCoE certification, I'm not involved in that process. It would probably be best if you contact your Partner touchpoint at SAP for more information. They should be able to clarify further your options.

Speaking again from the SAP Cloud ALM perspective, the Transition to SAP Cloud ALM page outlines that ITSM functionality is provided as built-in with SAP Solution Manager only. SAP Cloud ALM does not come with a built-in ITSM functionality, so Customers must rely on a third party ticketing software to work in concert with SAP Cloud ALM (via the APIs offered by the third party ticketing software). The instructions I have provided in my previous responses detail how to use SAP Cloud ALM as a kind of "middleware" for connecting your third party ITSM software to the SAP Support Backbone.

Thanks and regards,
John

entry.title: Re: SEGW: reflect boolean Data Element change of domain (...
entry.content:
I did the following actions:

  1. In SEGW, change the property type from Edm.Boolean to Edm.String,
  2. regenerated the service,
  3. then I changed back from Edm.String to Edm.Boolean,
  4. regenerated the service again.
  5. In /IWFND/GW_CLIENT, I cleared the buffer,
  6. I tested again and that was successful.

entry.title: Re: How the materials are getting displayed in Monitor ma...
entry.content: Check point 9 of my blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/mrp-simplifications-in-s-4hana/ba-p/13188797

entry.title: Re: Configuration using process env variable does not work for CDS_ENV_FEATURES_ASSERT_INTEGRITY
entry.content: I'm having the same problem. CDS version 7 is the default: cds.env.features.assert_integrity = false. Can you comment on how you resolved this with CDS_CONFIG?

entry.title: Re: Connect to sap HANA Database from Microsoft power BI(Business Intelligence)
entry.content:
Hi,

Can the connection from Power BI desktop to HANA instance in Cloud (BTP) possible via SSO?

For on-premise HANA, SSO is possible using Kerberos. However HANA Cloud DB does not support Kerberos. Any alternative for Power BI Desktop to HANA DB on Cloud SSO?

Thanks

Imtiaz

entry.title: Re: Put a New ZTable on SM30
entry.content:
I'm confused. If the sequence of events you're describing is correct, then this can't work.

Things to verify:

  • Your DB table has a "client" key field, right? Plus at least one additional key field?
  • Is your maintenance view based only on this DB table, or does it join other tables?
  • The generated maintenance dialog is for the maintenance view, right? not for the table?
  • Sometimes it helps recreating the generated artifacts (in SE55, or in SE11 via navigation to Utilities > Table Maintenance Generator).

If this doesn't help, you may want to post some screenshots of your table, view, and dialog generation parameters; that might make it easier to spot problems.

entry.title: Re: Unconverted value from Table PRPS into ABAP CDS
entry.content: Thanks for your reply, it is needed to send the data to Azure so will be consumed directly.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content: This is great news for all the Bobj users.

entry.title: Re: Roadmap for migration of SAP BO artifacts to SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi KP76,

Thank you for your question.

You're right: we have no plan to provide migration tool from SAP BusinessObjects assets to SAP Analytics Cloud ones. However, we are offering a set of services and tools to support transition. Please check https://www.sap.com/products/data-cloud/cloud-analytics/extend-analytics.html.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 2025: What’s New In Web Intelligence and Semantic Layer
entry.content: this is great for all the bobj users

How can I renew my C_TFIN52 certificate?

Regards,

Antonio Nieto

entry.title: Re: Which is the new version of C_HCADM_05 certification?
entry.content: Why would we take C_DBADM or much of anything else? SAP misleads on availability of assessments to continue the certificaitons. SAP will dead end C_DBADM in no time. Like C_HCADM, it won't even be visible in searches long BEFORE the validity runs out.

entry.title: Lock WBS Element programmatically using BAPI or Function Module
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My requirement is to lock WBS element programmatically using BAPi or Function Module. I have found one BAPI 'BAPI_BUS2054_CHANGE_MULTI' to update the WBS element, but didn't found any field to lock the WBS element under project definition and project profile level. 

If anyone has worked on this kind of a requirement / any suggestions would be helpful.

Thanks.

--

Regards,

Mayuresh

entry.title: Re: Unconverted value from Table PRPS into ABAP CDS
entry.content: how you send the data?

entry.title: Re: Experience Your Favourite BI Platform, BOBJ, in a Fresh New Look with the SAP BI 2025 Release
entry.content: Very informative, thank you. The BI 2025 package was announced to be available on March 12th. But I still don't see it in the Software Download portal. Has it been delayed further?

entry.title: SAP GUI - Transaction Code - DBACOCKPIT (SQL Editor)
entry.content:
last updated: 2025-03-12

Introduction
The article explains the SAP GUI – TCODE (Transaction Code): DBACOCKPIT (SQL Editor) usage in details.

SAP GUI

  • SAP Help Portal – SAP GUI for Windows
  • SAP Community – SAP GUI – SAP GUI Family
  • 147519 – Maintenance strategy / deadlines for SAP GUI for Windows / SAP GUI for Java

Description
The SQL editor allows to flexibly executes SQL statements for analysis purposes, e.g. SQL statements provided via SAP Note 1969700 (further details in SAP Knowledge Base Article 3311408). 

Transaction Code:
DBACOCKPIT 

DBA Cockpit menu structure (Navigation Panel):
Diagnostics > SQL Editor

  • SAP Help Portal - DBA Cockpit for SAP HANA - Screen Layout in DBA Cockpit for SAP HANA

Screen: SQL Editor
The following image represents an empty SQL Editor.

Usage:

General SQL statement / command can be executed.

Result

Advanced SQL Statement from SQL Statement Collection reports also can be executed.

Result

Related SAP documentations
The following SAP documentations belongs to the topic.

  • 3506374 - How-to: Execute SQL command for HANA DB
  • 3509699 - How to execute SQL scripts from SAP note 1969700

Other articles in this series
🔖 3428763 - Bookmark of frequently used SAP GUI transaction codes for SAP HANA related investigations

Do you have further questions?
Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have question or observation regarding the article.
SAP Community for SAP GUI: https://community.sap.com/topics/gui

Contribution
If you find any missing information belongs to the topic, please let me know. I am happy to add the new content. My intention is to maintain the content continuously to keep the info up-to-date.

Release Information

Release DateDescription
2025.03.12First/initial Release of the SAP Blog Post documentation (Product Information).

entry.title: Re: Text determination procedure in S4HANA
entry.content: Check SAP notes 2415712 and 2806707

entry.title: Re: Any help please
entry.content: What help you need from this forum?

entry.title: Connecting to csv files in Crystal 2020 using the 64 bit ODBC?
entry.content:
Like other people, I am struggling to connect to csv files in Crystal Reports 2020 (having recently upgraded from Crystal XI). I understand that this is due to Crystal 2020 being 64 bit, and as such ODBC 64 needs to connect to the csv file formats, rather than Crystal itself directly - however I am unable to find a driver or see how this works. 

I cannot see an answer here or elsewhere- has any other user had any success with csv files in Crystal 2020?

Many thank in advance,

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: DRC - Italy - Official document numbering (ODN)
entry.content:
Dear Collegues,

I am having some issue fulfilling a requirements from my business team. From their understanding of the regulation, all invoices must have <FatturaElettronicaBody><DatiGenerali><DatiGeneraliDocumento><Numero> sequential.

However, it did happen that when a wrong posting is performed the eDocument generated is rejected to SDI without any solution to correct it and resend. In this case, the document number is not transmitted to the SDI and this results in a 'gap' of the numbering. (Reversing it without sending the reversal invoice generates an additional numbering gap).

I don't see any workaround (or at least non that do not involve some specific coding) to this probem and I would be curious to know how some of you have dealt with this issue.

For a better understanding of the current system configuration :
For source type FI_INVOICE - tag <Numero> gets it's value from field BKPF-BELNR
For source type SD_INVOICES - tag <Numero> gets it's value from field VBRK-VBELN
The business ask that a different numbering record be used for the tag - that would increment only invoices that have been correctly correctly receieved by SDI...

entry.title: Re: Configure Weigh and Dispense (W&D) in SAP Digital Manufacturing using the new Asset Model (D
entry.content:
Hello Manoel,

Thank you for the very good instructions. I have been able to connect my own scale to the system. However, I am currently encountering a problem. Is it correct that the scale connection only works for the process industry, but not for the discrete industry?

Best regards,
David

entry.title: Re: Get started with the ABAP custom code migration process
entry.content:
@BaerbelWinkler 

Hi Bärbel,

I've just checked this with our development team. TADIR-SRCSYSTEM is not used by the Custom Code Migration app for scoping determination. Probably it is something wrong with the usage data snapshot. Please open a ticket to the BC-DWB-CEX-CCM to get this investigated in detail.

Best regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Recalculating Time accruals based on Seniority and FTE using Off Cycle Event Rule
entry.content: @EvangeliaP @Yes you are right .. this is an old blog ..now you don’t need provisioning for this job .. you can schedule off cycle job from UI ( job scheduler)

entry.title: Re: Get started with the ABAP custom code migration process
Re: Any help please
entry.content:
Help me on periodic billing plan Item net value 5000, can we split 48 months in Sales contract.

In Sales contract: Periodic billing plan

For example item net value - 5000 ÷48 months= 104.16

5000÷24 months= 208.3

5000÷36 months= 138.8

Business wants to show item net value and billing plan must be same.

Can we split into 2years (24 months), 3years (36 months), 4years ( 48 months)

If yes, pl. help me with configuration settings.

entry.title: Re: Export Manual Test Plans/Cases from one SAP Cloud ALM...
entry.content: Hi, is it possible to Upload as well Screenshots using this Work-Around or are there some limitations?

entry.title: Having issues with clicking in a cell in SinglePlanningCalendarMonthView
entry.content:
I have a SinglePlanningCalendar where I dynamically put buttons in individual days, and it works great.

When I click in an empty cell, all the buttons disappear.  I've tried attaching events cellClick and cellSelect to the calendar to fire a specific function (onCalendarCellClick) but for some reason, that function never fires.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Please let me know if any more information is needed.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Re: Create Business Partner via API class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN

Hi Thorsten,

I used maintain method of this class for creating BP, but the tax classification was not writen to the KNVI table. Can you please help me, how to solve this problem?

A lot of thanks Artur

entry.title: Re: HTTPS Sender adapter in iFlow shows sometimes a 401 e...
entry.content: Hi Andrzej, Thanks for this explanation. I was not aware of that. But my real issue is that the same interface will get a 401 all the time. Do you have an idea how that can happen?

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms 1.0 Released Features
entry.content:
@rafael_umeda Certainly, perhaps at the operation header level you have a location that is triggering a form, but during the maintenance task a particular equipment type is also triggering another form, you would then have two forms in 1 workflow.  

@MaximoSanchez please check the SDF API documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/dynamic-forms/api-documentation/maif-integration

@momo666 please check the SDF configuration guide, should explain how to attach forms manually via MAIF.  https://help.sap.com/docs/dynamic-forms/configuration-guide/document-history

Regards,

William

entry.title: How to disable sap-iapp-state--history
entry.content:
Hi,

May I know if there is a way to disable sap-iapp-state--history as this seems to have impacting loading of FIORI Elements applications on refresh.

entry.title: Re: Any help please
entry.content: Check SAP note 831158 Q5

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: Hi @PetraRana, unfortunately, I cannot look into your data based on your community profile, so please reach out to support. There is no technical issue documented so if you have a valid Learning Hub subscription you should reach the assessment. I know that there was a issue on friday but that got solved Friday evening already. Can you maybe ensure that your user really has a valid Learning Hub subscription (you should see this in the "Subscriptions" section in My learning ) and if yes please try again? If it is not working again then please open a support ticket. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @AntonioNieto 

This is a retired certification that cannot be kept valid anymore.

Please see SAP Certification finder:

There is a recommendation to get certified in SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Fina.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: Any help please
entry.content: Hi Sir,

entry.title: Re: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying st...
entry.content: Same is happening to me using the Fiori Toolbar. The styles are applied for Android correctly but failing for iOS. In order to have them working on Android we have set the Fiori toolbar and the ToolbarItem is of Button and Primary. We have added a css class with color and background color on both Button and Image Style entries for the ToolbarItem.

entry.title: Re: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying st...

entry.title: Re: I am getting "The Cloud Foundry trial failed to start. Please try again later."

entry.title: Integration Suite Event Mesh Capability - Programmatically query queues
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to know if there is a programmatic way to query queues (names, Queue Size, number of Messages Queued, number of Unacknowledged Messages) like by using an ODATA service.

We need to create an alert if messages stored in the queues are not being consumed by the iFlows, but right now, we couldn't find a way to do it, only a manual way.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule - Identity Provisioning - No assigned Roles displayed
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

A little bit of confusing these days. I follow a different documentation: the Joule Onboarding Guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/6189c8655c484916bb8eb767126a653a/48e8f655470048c29555272578fbc2ce.html. Your Discovery Center documentation is new to me.

I am working on this Joule topic these days. If I get something, I will be back to you. At the moment, I don' t have an answer.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Issue while routing creation using FM BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE to create routing with parameter effective change number. Data is passed to this BAPI via RFC call from and external system and I am getting below error.

<scalar name='TYPE' value='A'/>
<scalar name='ID' value='CPCC_DT'/>
<scalar name='NUMBER' value='201'/>
<scalar name='MESSAGE' value='Installation of the data transfer failed'/>
<scalar name='LOG_NO' value=''/>
<scalar name='LOG_MSG_NO' value='000000'/>
<scalar name='MESSAGE_V1' value=''/>
<scalar name='MESSAGE_V2' value=''/>
<scalar name='MESSAGE_V3' value=''/>
<scalar name='MESSAGE_V4' value=''/>
<scalar name='PARAMETER' value='TRANSFER_HEADER_INTERFACE'/>

When I am passing the same data, manually in SAP directly using SE37, routing gets created.

As per my analysis this has something to do with header data transfer, but cannot determined as everything looks goods

Has anyone came across this error.

Thanks

Vilas

entry.title: Re: Can we add same subcurricula/item to multiple Parent...
entry.content: SAP Partners have access to the connectors workbook via the SAP Partner Portal.

entry.title: Re: Runtime Errors MESSAGE_TYPE_X & ABAP: Program CL_FINS_UNIQUE_CVTYP==========CP
entry.content: Please contact SAP

entry.title: 🚀 SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro – SAP Analytics Cloud! 🌍
entry.content:
No dia 15 de março de 2025, estarei no SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro para compartilhar insights sobre SAP Analytics Cloud – Soluções Inteligentes para Negócios Orientados por Dados.

📅 Data: 15 de março de 2025

📍 Local: Edifício Argentina, Botafogo, RJ

🚀 Participe dessa troca de conhecimento e venha contribuir com a comunidade! Nos vemos lá!

entry.title: Re: Quick Tip: BRF+ trace in TM conditions troubleshooting
entry.content: SAP has released a KBA about that: 3581783 - Change Controller Determination Strategy is not called on subsequent predecessor document changes

entry.title: Re: Can DM user reschedule orders or set processing time...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Here you will find some documentation and SAP Note regarding first question: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/enabling-schedule-download-for-planned-orders

https://me.sap.com/notes/3338460

And for the second question I hope you will find your answers here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/order-schedule?locale=en-US&q=Setup+Time

Hope it will guide you to final solution of your cases.

Regards, 

Jagoda

entry.title: SAP SUCCESSFACTORS EMPLOYEE CENTRAL
entry.content:
Bonjour à tous,

Je commence avec SAP et je souhaiterais que quelqu'un puisse m'aider davantage sur ce module en me formant 1h à 2h par semaine. Nous pourrons échanger sur les modalités.

Si cela est possible pour vous, je pourrai vous contacter par mail.
Merci et belle continuation,

Marie

entry.title: New Learning Experience Switch
entry.content: Hello! Does anyone know if the New LX switch is going away in May or November?

entry.title: Hosting SAP Code jam events in Buenos Aires Argentina
entry.content: Dear Community, I would happily host or co-host a Code Jam in Buenos Aires, Argentina. We would like to have it in Spanish!

entry.title: We have a problem with some delivery plans because the cumulative total is not equal to 0.
entry.content:
We have a problem with some delivery plans because the cumulative total is not equal to 0.
Within the same delivery plan with the same material and the same customer, when a new EDI message is added, the system treats one delivery plan item differently than another. In one item, it sets the counter to 0 when the EDI is added, and in other items, it resets to 0.

We don't understand the criteria and need to be clear about it.

entry.title: Re: Importing Actuals from ACDOCA table into SAC using API
entry.content:
Thanks @Susanne_Helbig , we'll activate the API in S/4 and test if we're able to extract the required data

Just to confirm, the query A_JournalEntryItemBasic extracts Actuals data from ACDOCA table in S/4? Reason I want to confirm is because I'm unable to select certain GL accounts in the query filter even though there is data on those GL accounts in the ACDOCA table.

entry.content: Excellent summary, thank you.

entry.title: Re: Does the SAP Enable Now Certification will be retired...
entry.content: now it seams that there is one, in certification finder if you locl for C_SEN cretification, in the Notes at for today I can see that there is any alternative and Enable Now tool will be replaced by WalkMe

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi.. happy to join and contribute to the community.thanks

entry.title: Can I display one field or another depending on filter values?
entry.content:
Hello, I'm new to SAC and still learning how it works and I,ve stumbled upon a headscratcher. 

I have a requirement where, in a table with multiple rows and columns, I'd like to display Field1 if the country filter value is set to Canada, and Field2 if the filter is set to US. All other fields in the table would be the same. 

The filter is an All Pages filter. 

I think this is feasable leveraging scripting, but I'm not sure how to go about it, any help would be appreciated. 

Thank you!

kannan

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025

Can't wait to start having fun with it...

entry.title: Italy eDocument for zero value invoices
entry.content:
Hi, 

There is a requirement from our Italy clients to develop sales and invoice document types for selling samples to customers. When I made the changes in Development system for a zero value samples invoice, the eDocument is failing. When I created the same invoice with a 0.01 EUR value, the eDocument was transmitted. Does this mean that Italy eDocument does not work for zero value invoices? Could someone please provide a note or KBA to confirm or resolve this?

Thanks,
Vishnu

entry.title: Re: User Experience Advances with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (Private Cloud and On-Premise)
entry.content: @wagener-mark I suggest that you create a Customer Influence Program (CIP) request for this, so we can see how many other customers vote for it. Here is the link to do it: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1177

entry.title: Re: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying st...
entry.content: @iramosastola Styles for iOS Fiori Toolbar button are working for me in MDK 24.11.2.  See example screenshot below.  The Style Test text in the Fiori Toolbar is styled green.

entry.title: Re: HTTPS Sender adapter in iFlow shows sometimes a 401 e...
entry.content: deleted 🙂

entry.title: remove space at end of the target field MAT_PLANT in sap bw transformation level
entry.content:
i have been getting space in MAT_PLANT field at end of the name it has different type of naming conventions like '0000000334455' and fiew with text model like  E2S5T10, VALLWH... etc like wise however actual flow is DS-->DSO1-->DSO2-->MP  DS to DSO1 There is a function module to remove space and add '.' dot . but bringing the records  to DSO1 ex:

record 1 has  'VALLWH' and plant 5000 and

record 2 'VALLWH  '  plant 5001

then after transformation it bringing like

record 1  'VALLWH' and plant 5000 and

record 2 'VALLWH  '  plant 5001

record 3 'VALLWH.'  plant 5001

i tried all the possible ways to  remove trailing and leading space with field routine and formula between DSO1 to DSO2  like REPLACE ...RTRIM,CONDESE, SHIFT LEFT ect but couldnt find the solution i am not sure What is the cause and why am not able to removing it please experts help me on this at Target field MAT_PLANT

entry.title: Re: HTTPS Sender adapter in iFlow shows sometimes a 401 e...
entry.content: Ron, if you get the 401 Unauthorized error all the same then there is something wrong with secret key and/or protocol used by your external partner. Could you please perform a simple test using SoapUI or Postman? If you will be able to send a test message to your interface using the same secret key then it means that guys from your partner made a mistake in their configuration/implementation.

entry.title: Enhancing SAP IBP Integration: Evolution and Innovation
entry.content:
At SAP, we're committed to providing our customers with cutting-edge solutions that streamline operations and reduce costs. We're excited to share some important updates about our SAP IBP integration offerings.  

Continuity for CI-DS Users 

First and foremost, we want to reassure IBP customers using CI-DS: there are no plans to sunset or discontinue the CI-DS integration. With all SAP IBP customers relying on SAP CI-DS, we remain committed to supporting and maintaining this integration method with Bug fixes and security related enhancements. 

Behind-the-Scenes Improvements 

While maintaining continuity for our users, we're also working on enhancing the underlying infrastructure. The CI-DS infrastructure is transitioning from the SAP NEO cloud infrastructure to a SAP BTP Kyma-based infrastructure. This change happens behind the scenes, ensuring that end-users won't experience any changes in system look, feel, or behavior. 

Exciting New Integration Option Coming in H2-2025 

We're thrilled to announce that in the second half of 2025, we'll be introducing a new integration option that promises faster and tighter integration with SAP ERP and S/4HANA On Premise and Private Cloud systems. This new feature will utilize SAP real-time integration and the Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Suite.  
SAP real-time integration will seamlessly integrate master, order, and stock data, while the Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Suite will allow for the transfer of Key Figure data and offer flexibility to connect to other SAP systems, third-party, legacy systems, databases, and files. 

Key Benefits of the New Integration: 

  1. Seamless and Flexible Integration: Customers will enjoy a more streamlined integration process with SAP ERP systems. 
  2. Out-of-the-Box Integration: Predefined content will make setup and maintenance easier than ever. 
  3. The Integration Suite's broad capabilities and use cases across SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, Concur, Ariba, and more enable consolidation into a single middleware, reducing the time, cost, and effort required to integrate diverse business systems 

What This Means for You 

Existing CI-DS users can confidently continue with their current integration methods. For those considering SAP IBP or seeking to optimize their integration processes, the forthcoming SAP real-time integration and SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration option will offer an efficient and cost-effective solution. Currently, customers can access selected integration packages for SAP IBP with S/4 Public Cloud, Ariba, Everstream, and SAP SAC through the Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Suite. 

Looking Ahead 

These developments reflect our ongoing commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction. By offering multiple integration options, we're ensuring that businesses can choose the solution that best fits their unique requirements and infrastructure. 

We're excited about these advancements and look forward to seeing how they will benefit our customers' operations. As we approach the launch date for the new SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration integration option, we'll provide more detailed information and guidance. 

Additional information:

  • https://www.sap.com/canada/products/technology-platform/integration-suite.html 
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/what-is-sap-cloud-integration
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite 
  • https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/integration-suite?region=all

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the New York Community
entry.content:
Hello everyone! 😊

I'm Dominik, and I recently moved to the US, very close to New York City. I'm currently working in the Lead to Cash Stream as a SAP solution consultant and am here for a transformation project.

I’m also preparing for the Marathon to qualify for the Boston Marathon, which has been quite a journey! 

I wanted to ask if this group is still active and if there are any ongoing meetups or events happening soon. I’m eager to connect with fellow SAP enthusiasts and share experiences.

Looking forward to hearing from you all! 😊

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Purchase Order NBIC does not allow Item...
entry.content:
Hello, 

It was similar question but not for Cloud solution, I think it might help:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/subcontracting-process-between-intercompany-plants-from-different-company/qaq-p/12354653

Please make sure, that Plant B is created as vendor, because even though its STO process, system might act as standard Subcontracting process. 

Also refer to Best Practises on that case:

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2023/SolP/BMY?region=DE

Hope you find it helpfull!

Jagoda

entry.title: Re: CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY using RAP ( Unmanaged )
entry.content: can you please paste the whole code, as some  part of the code is  missing in DEEP_CREATE Method

entry.title: Contact Person Creation in SAP S4 HANA: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
This blog post provides a step-by-step guide on how to create a contact person, link them to a customer, and understand the derivation of contact person number ranges. Additionally, it explores technical details like CVI mapping, relevant tables, and customization options using BADI.

Objective

The primary objective of this blog post is to help SAP S/4HANA users:

1. Create a contact person for a Business Partner.
2. Link the contact person to a customer.
3. Understand how contact person number ranges are derived.
4. Explore technical aspects like CVI mapping and customization options.

Create and Link Contact Person in S4 HANA

Create BP using "person" and Role "BUP001".
Contact person - 800000102 created.

Go to actual BP - 800000101 and navigate to the Relationship tab.

1. Select the relationship category FBUR001 (Contact Person).
2. Add the contact person (e.g., 800000102) and Maintain all necessary details such as department, function, and communication data.
3. Upon saving, the contact person (95) will be created and linked to the Business Partner.

Additionally we can find CVI map in Tcode- MDS_LINKS, where we can see Contact person  for BP- 800000102 created contact person 95 for customer.

Maintain partner Function for BP.
Navigate to the Sales Area Data and Partner Functions tab in the Business Partner (BP) transaction.

Contact person 95 is now linked with Customer master, shown below in table- KNVP & KNVK.

Finding CVI Mapping
To link a contact person to a customer in SAP S/4HANA, we can find the GUID from the table- BUT000  and reference it in the  table- CVI_CUST_CT_LINK. Here's how you can achieve this:

Understanding Contact Person Number Range
The contact person number (e.g., 95) is created based on the number range object “PARTNER” and the number range “AP”, which is hardcoded for this process.

For customization of the contact person creation process, implement the BADI: CVI_CUSTOM_MAPPER

entry.title: Re: Receiving Electronic Invoices by Email in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Lukas,

Thanks for your feedback and the question!

To increase automation for receiving electronic invoices by email in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP offers a more automated solution through SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management. We also have a blog describing this solution: Receiving Electronic Invoices by Email in SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management. In that blog, two options are described and option 1 is about the automatic extraction from the email and upload of the XML.

Best regards,

Monika

entry.title: Re: Unable to download Agent 3 on Mac
entry.content:
Hi guys, I have exactly the same problem. The BPA user has all admin roles, and the related s-number has download software authorization.

On the SAP development tools page was active the option to download the Mac agent but now it seems that for some reason they disabled it, and now it doesn't appear, only Windows. And from the SAP Build Process Automation control tower it does not download indicating the error message contact administrator, but it does not information that would allow to know what is missing.

The above menctioned note indicates that IRPA or BPA licenses must be held by the user declared in the RBSC portal, under the tab "Licences"; but we are working with the Trial sub-account for BTP for testing and proof of concept purposes, before suggesting the purchase of the pay as you go. How can we then download the Mac Desktop Agent for the trial account? If there is an option to download the Agent for windows for a Trial BTP account, is there for Mac?

Please give Us any advice in order to solve the issue. Thank you very much in advance for any help you can give us.

Best regards .

entry.title: SAP Ariba Guided Sourcing Event Invitation Process
entry.content:
Hello, our company has implemented SAP Ariba Sourcing  Guided Sourcing module last year, going live in May 2024.  Adoption has been going well, but are consistently running into issues with invited suppliers unable to access our sourcing events.  The issues vary from suppliers not receiving the RFx invitation email to inability to access our Guided Sourcing event due to Ariba registration or linking existing supplier ANID. 

There is limited support provided by SAP Ariba for this and from simple internet searches see this is a common issue for many companies and was hoping to hear from some other companies who have found a way to manage these supplier access issues for their guided sourcing events.

entry.title: Re: New Learning Experience Switch
entry.content: @Nikki_Montes, if you're referring to the removal of the legacy Learning home page, its deletion is currently scheduled for the 2H 2025 release (Deprecation of Legacy Learning Home Page).

entry.title: Re: Having issues with clicking in a cell in SinglePlanni...
entry.content:
Update:  Got it to work by using this:

 $(oCalendarInRender.getDomRef()).on("click", ".sapMSPCMonthDay", (e) => {
                    console.log("Clicked calendar cell:", e.target);
                    this.onCalendarCellClick(e);
     });

entry.title: Re: 🚀 SAP Inside Track Rio de Janeiro – SAP Analytics Cloud! 🌍
entry.content: Super ansiosa para essa palestra.

entry.title: Re: User Role Thresholds in LMS
entry.content: @INPEX, as far as I understand, there's no limit on the number of users assigned to a particular role, nor are there performance risks associated with having multiple users in the same role. Each role, be it admin, instructor, or user, will be defined by the specific actions and access/security constraints required. Within the same company, these roles can vary significantly (User Roles).

entry.title: Re: MDK Filter Action and QuerySpecifier quotes
entry.content:
In your rule you just need to get the value of the control and add it to the array.  Here is an example rule.

export default function GetFilterResults(context) {
    let result1 = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:Products_Filter/#Control:MultiSort/#Value');
    let result2 = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:Products_Filter/#Control:FCFilter/#Value');

    let filterResults = [result1, result2];

    return filterResults;
}

entry.title: Re: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'

entry.title: How do you get the book page in Learner View to match Producer?
entry.content:
I am updating some EnableNow Tutuorials.  I attached a new recording to an existing Book Page.  In Producer everything looks correct and has the template we use for our tutorials.  When you access the content via the Learner View it has an outdated format that hasn't been used since we went live with the product.  

Any suggestions of what I might be missing in order to get the correct template page to load in the Learner View?

Included are screenshots of the Producer Book Page and then what is viewed in the Learner View.

entry.title: Re: Planning your System Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition following SAP Activate
entry.content:
Hello @kpon 

The Technical Review workshop is supposed to happen during Discover. Please check the task Conduct SAP Readiness Check - Technical Review Workshop. In that task we have included a PDF with all the details about the technical workshop.

Regard,

Jose M.
